query: How many times in 2026 has a NATO manned fighter aircraft actually shot down a drone over NATO member-state territory (air-to-air kill)? List confirmed incidents with dates and locations (e.g. Poland, Romania, Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania, Finland). Distinguish fighter air-to-air kills from SAM/ground-based downings and from un-intercepted strikes.
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's the bottom line for your forecast:

## Key Findings

**Confirmed NATO fighter air-to-air drone kills over NATO territory in 2026: exactly 2**

1. **May 19, 2026 — Estonia — Romanian F-16** (Baltic Air Policing from Šiauliai). ✓ Verified
2. **June 8, 2026 — Latvia — French Rafale** (Baltic Air Policing from Šiauliai). ✓ Verified — explicitly described as "the second confirmed shootdown over Baltic territory in three weeks."

**The "late June 2026 Poland" claim is NOT verified.** I found no reporting of any NATO fighter air-to-air drone kill over Poland in 2026. The only Poland fighter shootdown on record is **September 9–10, 2025** (the Russian incursion that launched Operation Eastern Sentry, mostly Dutch jets) — a 2025 event, not 2026. This claim appears to be a fabrication or confusion in the question description.

**Type distinctions (important for the forecast):**
- Both 2026 kills were against **stray Ukrainian strike drones** diverted by Russian EW — not deliberate Russian attacks.
- The May 29, 2026 Romanian apartment-block hit (Galați, 2 injured) was an **un-intercepted strike**, not a shoot-down.
- No SAM/ground-based downings over NATO territory found in 2026.

**ROE:** NATO clearly permits and has exercised drone shoot-downs (Sept 2025 Poland; May/June 2026 Baltics). Baltic states rely on rotational NATO Baltic Air Policing fighters. There's active pressure (Baltic presidents, May 21) to strengthen this into full air defense.

**Frequency/trajectory for July 1–9, 2026:** Two fighter kills occurred in a ~3-week May–June window, incursions were accelerating, and late-June intelligence warned of possible further Russian provocations — an elevated-threat baseline, though such events remain relatively rare and depend on a stray drone actually entering airspace and being deemed worth a missile engagement.

sources.title: NATO jet shoots down Ukrainian drone over Estonia in escalation of airspace violations
sources.snippet: Romanian F-16 from Šiauliai shot down suspected Ukrainian drone over Estonia; fell near Lake Võrtsjärv/Põltsamaa just before 13:00; a first.

sources.title: French Rafale shoots down drone over Latvia in NATO mission
sources.snippet: French Rafale from Šiauliai shot down drone over Bērzgale parish, Rēzekne, Latvia on June 8, 2026 — 'second confirmed shootdown over Baltic territory in three weeks.'

sources.title: NATO fighter downs drone over Estonia in second Baltic incursion in 48 hours
sources.snippet: Baltic Air Policing fighter shot down intruding drone over Lake Võrtsjärv, southern Estonia, May 19, 2026; debris near Kablaküla.

sources.title: NATO jets shoot down drone over Latvia, extending Ukraine spillover fears
sources.snippet: Drone entered Latvian airspace due to Russian electronic warfare; downed by NATO (French Rafale) jets.

sources.title: A NATO jet shoots down a suspected Ukrainian drone over Estonia
sources.snippet: Romanian F-16 with Baltic Air Policing shot down suspected Ukrainian drone over central Estonia; brought down between Lake Võrtsjärv and Põltsamaa.

sources.title: Romania says Russian drone hit apartment block, NATO vows to defend alliance territory
sources.snippet: Russian drone crashed into apartment block in Galați, Romania, injuring a woman and child — un-intercepted strike, May 29, 2026.

sources.title: NATO members condemn Russia after drone slams into Romania apartment building, wounding two
sources.snippet: Explosive-laden Russian drone hit apartment building in Romania, injuring two; not shot down.

sources.title: How Russia is turning Ukraine's drones against NATO
sources.snippet: Russia using GPS spoofing to steer Ukrainian strike drones into NATO airspace; Romanian apartment block hit likely first casualties on NATO soil since 2022.

sources.title: Baltic presidents push NATO to shift to air defense mission
sources.snippet: May 21, 2026 joint statement by Estonia, Latvia, Lithuania presidents urging NATO to transition Baltic Air Policing to full air defense with counter-drone capabilities.

sources.title: Operation Eastern Sentry
sources.snippet: NATO operation launched Sept 12, 2025 to counter Russian drones violating eastern-flank airspace; collective aerial defense posture.

sources.title: 2025 Russian drone incursion into Poland
sources.snippet: Sept 9-10, 2025: 19-23 drones entered Poland; up to four shot down, most by Dutch jets; Article 4 invoked.

sources.title: NATO Fighters Shoot Down Russian Drones Over Poland
sources.snippet: First time allied aircraft used force to defend NATO airspace, Sept 10, 2025.

sources.title: Guardian: Russia may be preparing provocation in Poland or Baltic states
sources.snippet: June 28, 2026: intelligence warns of possible Russian provocations against Poland/Baltics; Tusk calls situation 'very unstable.'

Confirmed NATO fighter air-to-air drone kills over Poland in 2026
Drones shot down in Sept 9-10 2025 Poland incursion (prior year, for context)
Days between the two 2026 Baltic fighter shootdowns (May 19 to June 8)
